section.title: 1. Real Numbers and Expressions
section.topic: Operations on sets: union, intersection, difference
Absolute value: equations and inequalities of type |x-a| < d
Powers and roots (including fractional exponents)
Logarithms: definition and properties of sums/differences
Percentages: increases, decreases, and simple/compound interest
Short multiplication formulas: (a±b)², (a±b)³, a²-b²

section.title: 2. Equations and Inequalities
section.topic: Linear equations and inequalities with one variable
Quadratic equations: delta (Δ), roots, and vertex coordinates
Quadratic inequalities: solving and sketching parabolas
Polynomial equations: solving by grouping or common factor
Rational equations: solving equations of type P(x)/Q(x) = 0
Systems of linear equations: substitution and elimination methods

section.title: 3. Functions
section.topic: General properties: domain, range, zeros, monotonicity
Linear function: f(x) = ax + b, parallel and perpendicular conditions
Quadratic function: standard, vertex, and factored forms
Exponential functions: f(x) = a^x and its graphs
Inverse proportionality: f(x) = a/x
Transformations: f(x-p)+q, f(-x), and -f(x)

section.title: 4. Sequences
section.topic: General sequence terms and recursive definitions
Arithmetic sequences: n-th term and sum of n terms
Geometric sequences: n-th term and sum of n terms
Sequence properties: constant ratio and constant difference

section.title: 5. Trigonometry
section.topic: Right triangle trigonometry: sin, cos, tan
Trigonometric identities: sin²α + cos²α = 1 and tanα = sinα/cosα
Reduction formulas: angles like (90° - α) and (180° - α)
Specific values: 30, 45, and 60 degrees

section.title: 6. Geometry (Planimetry and Analytical)
section.topic: Triangle properties: sine and cosine rules
Circle geometry: central vs. inscribed angles, tangents
Similarity and congruence: SSS, SAS, AAA scales
Analytical geometry: distance formula, midpoint, and line equations

section.title: 7. Stereometry (3D)
section.topic: Prisms and Pyramids: volume and surface area
Rotational solids: Cylinder, Cone, and Sphere
Angles in space: between edges, faces, and planes

section.title: 8. Statistics and Probability
section.topic: Combinatorics: multiplication principle and permutations
Classical probability: P(A) = |A|/|Ω|
Descriptive statistics: mean, median, mode, and standard deviation
